column1: Instructions: Copy this file to a new name, then update the below table with the Sensor Hub configuration. First set the ECU name, then set each CAN signal name to something sensible (e.g. STARTUP_LOOP_VALUE), then each pull up/down/cap value. 0 if shorted and NC if not connected. Supports alphabetic units like '1u' or '5k' ohms

column4: fixed 3 frames regardless of channel config
